description: Create an interactive GeoGebra applet that demonstrates the relationship between the unit circle and the sine function. The applet should feature a slider 'a' for the angle (range 0 to 2π), a unit circle centered at the origin, and a point P on the circle with coordinates (cos(a), sin(a)). Additionally, include the graph of the sine function f(x) = sin(x) with a corresponding point Q at (a, sin(a)) that moves with the slider. Add a text annotation showing the current angle value. Save the project as 'unit_circle_trig.ggb' in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/.
